---
name: Severity correction
about: Propose a change to an existing item's severity rating
title: '[SEVERITY] Rule X.Y — current: High, proposed: Critical'
labels: severity-correction
assignees: ''
---

## Rule ID

<!-- e.g. 6.1 -->

## Current severity

<!-- e.g. High -->

## Proposed severity

<!-- e.g. Critical -->

## Exploitation scenario

<!-- Describe a specific, concrete scenario where this vulnerability is exploited. Generic statements like "this is dangerous" will not be accepted. Walk through what an attacker does step by step and what they gain. -->

## Reference

<!-- Link to a public incident, CVE, security research paper, or bug bounty report that supports the proposed severity change. -->
